testcase.name: Get booking report for a specific date range
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed When User requests to get booking report for data available.................passed Then API response status code of BR should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain booking report data.............................passed And Each booking in the report should have valid details....................passed
